title: dolichos subcapitatus
intro: Dolichos subcapitatus, also known as the bitter pea or horse gram, is a type of legume native to tropical and subtropical regions. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Dolichos subcapitatus include reducing blood sugar levels, aiding in digestion, and helping to manage hypertension. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds are typically dried and then used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
